examples: The conflictedness that Milton is encapsulating here is probably most intense in the last lines of this wonderful stanza.
It is one of the longest poems in the English language, the origin of Spenserian stanza.
"He tells the boy in the last stanza, if you endure you'll inherit the earth, " Mitchell says.
It also includes the final stanza of The Newborn, written to mark the birth of Daniel Day-Lewis.
